Row.Text: A Leader's Statue is a statue that adds +10 [ICON_CULTURE] culture, +10 [ICON_PEACE] faith, and +5 [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] happiness. A Monument must be built in a city before the Leader's Statue!
A Leader's Statue is a statue that adds +10 [ICON_CULTURE] culture, +10 [ICON_PEACE] faith, and +5 [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] happiness. A Monument must be built in a city before the Leader's Statue!
A Leader's Statue is a statue that adds +10 [ICON_CULTURE] culture, +10 [ICON_PEACE] faith, and +5 [ICON_HAPPINESS_1] happiness. A Monument must be built in a city before the Leader's Statue!
